layer_weights._notes: Dasha gates everything for parental loss. Transit Saturn over Sun/Moon is the strongest activation. Classical patterns provide structural confidence. Fast triggers pinpoint the day.

likelihood_thresholds._notes: Initial thresholds pending validation. Higher bar than childbirth due to severity of predictions.

base_scores._description: Base scores for rule sub-conditions. Classical texts define PRIORITY; these numbers are Layer 3 calibration.

dasha._calibration_note: Ketu-Saturn and Saturn-Rahu are the strongest dasha combinations for parental death based on BPHS text priority.

transit._calibration_note: Saturn over natal Sun/Moon is the primary transit activation. Sensitive point techniques need more validation.

fast_trigger._calibration_note: Fast triggers only fire when dasha + transit are active. Moon transit is fastest (2.5 days/sign).

outcome_calibration._calibration_notes: Priority order places death events above distress. Father and mother modes are resolved based on which planet axis (Sun/Moon) is more afflicted.

governance.adjustment_reason: First creation — no empirical calibration yet. Base scores derived from classical text priority ratings.
governance.safety_notes: SENSITIVE DOMAIN: Parental death predictions require extreme care in delivery. Never present without multi-layer confirmation. Always frame as 'periods of concern' rather than definitive predictions.
